exact_next_action: Finalize AO Atlas long-run wave with Promoter, Command, and public-safety readbacks.
continuation_contract_reason: final response allowed by recommendation readback

exact_next_action_readback.action: Finalize AO Atlas long-run wave with Promoter, Command, and public-safety readbacks.

final_response_denial_tests.ready_final_response_reason: ready nodes or exact next actions remain

final_response_allowance_tests.final_allowed_reason: all generated nodes complete and no ready nodes remain

blueprint_skip_docs.rule: Ready Atlas-owned tasks skip Blueprint unless requirements, authorization, candidate rules, or scope approval are missing.

foundry_import_ownership_docs.rule: Foundry import ownership stays single-node: Atlas imports only the current executable node, Foundry owns that bounded implementation evidence and run-link, and Atlas resumes from the checkpoint before importing the next node.

command_readback_requirements_docs.rule: Command readback requirements stay compact and gate-bound: Command reports node counts, lease status, checkpoint freshness, return gate, continuation contract reason, exact next action, first executable node, and final-response allowance without replacing Atlas workgraph or Foundry run-link evidence.

generated_continuation_prompt_public_saf.rule: Generated continuation prompts reject affirmative unsafe wording while explicit prohibition and denial lines remain allowed.

coverage: task id, low-risk mutation class, and Atlas planning boundary
source digest and source task digest evidence
no scheduling, execution, or approval flags

evidence_readme_long_run_section.summary: Documents the 40-node, 120-180 minute lease, checkpoint evidence requirements, final-response gate, cross-artifact agreement, no-promotion boundary, and RSI-denied boundary.

final_execution_readback.summary: Final readbacks report 40/40 recommendation nodes complete, ready_nodes=0, checkpoint_count=40, minimum lease met, final_response_allowed=true, continuation_contract_reason=final response allowed by recommendation readback, promotion_claimed=false, and RSI remains denied.

blocked_node_continuation_prompt: If a node becomes blocked or failed, record the exact blocked node id, missing evidence or stop gate, safe repair or repack action, and resume from the latest checkpoint after repair.

foundry_terminal_status_examples.required_readback: Foundry rollup reports completed, all node evidence exists, and no ready nodes remain.
Promoter and Command agree promotion is terminal, RSI remains denied, and no ready nodes remain.
Denial readback includes exact missing evidence, no ready repair node remains, and no authority advance is claimed.
Blocker readback names the exact repair or resume action before final response can close.

closure_artifacts.no_promotion_summary: No mutation authority promotion claimed; RSI remains denied.
closure_artifacts.foundry_promoted_terminal_example: promoted normalizes to completed only when Promoter and Command agree, RSI remains denied, and no ready nodes remain.

foundry_denied_terminal_examples.required_readback: Denied rollup names the missing node id, missing evidence key, and expected evidence path.
Denied rollup names the uncleared stop gate and the exact artifact needed before promotion can be reconsidered.
Denied rollup records the forbidden surface or RSI claim, refuses promotion, and keeps RSI denied.

all_complete_under_120.exact_next_action: Generate and execute the next useful Atlas recommendation wave until elapsed_minutes meets supervisor.min_minutes, or record a true hard blocker.

all_complete_lease_met.exact_next_action: Finalize AO Atlas long-run wave with Promoter, Command, and public-safety readbacks.

blocked_before_lease.exact_next_action: Resolve blocked or failed recommendation node with exact repair evidence.
